"'''''The Abduction'''''" is an adventure for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published in [[1992]] by [[West End Games]]. (The book's spine and all interior pages give the title as ''The Abduction of Crying Dawn Singer''; only the front cover uses the truncated title.) It was reprinted in ''[[Classic Adventures]]'', under the full title.

{{Book-stub}}

==Plot summary==
In this adventure, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents have to rescue a kidnapped [[Shashay]] celebrity, [[Crying Dawn Singer]] to avoid the Alliance being discredited in [[Rayter sector/Legends|Rayter sector]].
